channel.title: GitHub Lua Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Lua in GitHub

item.title: koreader/koreader
item.description: An ebook reader application supporting PDF, DjVu, EPUB, FB2 and many more formats, running on Cervantes, Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook and Android devices

item.title: nvim-lua/kickstart.nvim
item.description: A launch point for your personal nvim configuration

item.title: folke/lazy.nvim
item.description: 💤 A modern plugin manager for Neovim

item.title: folke/noice.nvim
item.description: 💥 Highly experimental plugin that completely replaces the UI for messages, cmdline and the popupmenu.

item.title: folke/tokyonight.nvim
item.description: 🏙 A clean, dark Neovim theme written in Lua, with support for lsp, treesitter and lots of plugins. Includes additional themes for Kitty, Alacritty, iTerm and Fish.

item.title: echasnovski/mini.nvim
item.description: Library of 40+ independent Lua modules improving overall Neovim (version 0.8 and higher) experience with minimal effort

item.title: nvim-telescope/telescope.nvim
item.description: Find, Filter, Preview, Pick. All lua, all the time.

item.title: mfussenegger/nvim-dap
item.description: Debug Adapter Protocol client implementation for Neovim

item.title: LuaLS/lua-language-server
item.description: A language server that offers Lua language support - programmed in Lua

item.title: williamboman/mason.nvim
item.description: Portable package manager for Neovim that runs everywhere Neovim runs. Easily install and manage LSP servers, DAP servers, linters, and formatters.

item.title: hrsh7th/nvim-cmp
item.description: A completion plugin for neovim coded in Lua.

item.title: mrcjkb/rustaceanvim
item.description: 🦀 Supercharge your Rust experience in Neovim! A heavily modified fork of rust-tools.nvim
